things.name: Overwater Bungalow Resort Stay
things.description: Stay in a glass-floor overwater villa above the turquoise Indian Ocean lagoon

things.name: Manta Ray & Whale Shark Snorkelling
things.description: Hanifaru Bay UNESCO Biosphere Reserve - snorkel with hundreds of manta rays feeding

things.name: Coral Reef Diving & Snorkelling
things.description: UNESCO-protected reefs with sea turtles, reef sharks, napoleonfish and hard corals

things.name: Male Friday Mosque (Hukuru Miskiy)
things.description: 17th-century coral stone mosque with intricate Arabic calligraphy and lacquer carvings

things.name: National Museum of Maldives
things.description: Pre-Islamic artefacts, royal regalia and Buddhist coral stone sculptures

things.name: Malé Fish Market (Local Market)
things.description: Dawn tuna market where fishermen bring in their catch - the heartbeat of Maldivian life

things.name: Bioluminescent Beach
things.description: Night swimming where plankton light up the water with electric blue bioluminescence

things.name: Sandbank Picnic
things.description: Uninhabited sandbanks only centimetres above sea level - ultimate isolation

things.name: Sunset Dolphin Cruise
things.description: Spinner dolphins somersault beside the boat as the sun sets over the Indian Ocean

things.name: Mas Huni (Tuna & Coconut Breakfast)
things.description: Traditional Maldivian breakfast - shredded tuna with coconut, onion and chilli on flatbread
